methods.description: This method involves processing raw sequencing reads to remove artifacts, assembling them into paired-end reads, and performing quality filtering. It also includes taxonomic assignment and clustering into Operational Taxonomic Units (OTUs) for phylogenetic analysis.

steps.description: Raw reads were de-multiplexed to samples based on their barcode sequences and MiSeq overhangs, primers, and barcode sequences were removed.
steps.searchable_summary: De-multiplex and clean raw sequencing reads

steps.description: Sequences were assembled to paired-end reads and quality-filtered in Mothur version 1.39.5.
steps.searchable_summary: Assemble and quality-filter paired-end reads using Mothur

steps.description: Quality-filtered reads were aligned against the SILVA database and chimeric sequences were removed with UCHIME algorithm in Mothur.
steps.searchable_summary: Align reads to SILVA database and remove chimeras using UCHIME

steps.description: Taxonomic assignment of all sequences was performed in Mothur against the SILVA database.
steps.searchable_summary: Assign taxonomy using SILVA database in Mothur

steps.description: Clustering into OTUs was done using a 95% similarity sequence cutoff.
steps.searchable_summary: Cluster sequences into OTUs with 95% similarity cutoff

steps.description: Representative sequences for each OTU were determined as the centroids of the distance matrix.
Representative sequences of unclassified OTUs were aligned in a standalone BLAST search against the NCBI's non-redundant nucleotide database.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform BLAST search for unclassified OTUs

methods.method_name: Identification of Foraminiferal Specimens and Phylogenetic Analysis
methods.description: This method involves the taxonomic identification of foraminiferal specimens based on sequence reads and constructing a phylogenetic tree to analyze the relationships among OTUs.

steps.description: Taxonomic identification was based on the TF with the greatest number of reads in each specimen.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify taxonomy based on TF read counts

steps.description: Representative TF sequences were aligned alongside sequences of their closest relatives and known foraminiferal species.
steps.searchable_summary: Align TF sequences with known relatives

steps.description: Maximum likelihood phylogenetic tree was constructed using MEGA7.

methods.description: This method describes the sampling of sediment cores from intertidal mudflat localities and the processing of these samples for further analysis.

steps.description: Two intertidal mudflat localities were sampled in November 2015 at the Dutch Wadden Sea.
steps.searchable_summary: Sample sediment cores from mudflat localities

steps.description: Sediment cores were processed by slicing, centrifuging, and freeze-drying.
steps.searchable_summary: Process sediment cores by slicing and freeze-drying

steps.description: Environmental DNA samples and foraminiferal specimens were obtained from sediment slices.
steps.searchable_summary: Extract eDNA and foraminiferal specimens from sediment
